tagModal.subtitle: Add or remove a tag across the selected profiles.

renameModal.subtitle: Number the selected profiles by a prefix, in their current visible order.

reassignModal.subtitle: Reassign, swap, or clear the proxies on the selected profiles.

modes.unique: Unique — one distinct proxy per profile
modes.pool: Round-robin — spread a set across profiles
modes.shuffle: Shuffle — swap the proxies they already have

reassignModal.shuffleNote: Each selected profile swaps to another selected profile's proxy. Needs at least two proxied profiles.
reassignModal.clearNote: Removes the proxy from every selected profile (they connect directly).
reassignModal.limited: Assigned {{assigned}} — {{skipped}} profile(s) had no proxy left in the source.

editor.authBanner: Recommended: bind an authenticator in Settings to keep your account secure.

general.name: Name
general.installedBuilds_one: {{count}} real Chrome build installed — the selected version launches the matching binary, so UA, Client-Hints and TLS all genuinely match. "Auto" uses the newest installed.
general.installedBuilds_other: {{count}} real Chrome builds installed — the selected version launches the matching binary, so UA, Client-Hints and TLS all genuinely match. "Auto" uses the newest installed.
general.noBuilds: No on-disk Chrome builds detected — using the bundled engine. Download a version below to install it.
general.identityHelpPre: Runs the same real Chrome build above, but presents as the chosen Chromium browser — UA token, Sec-CH-UA brands and navigator identity all match, while TLS/JA4 stay genuine (it

proxy.pasteTip: 💡 Tip: Paste your proxy "host:port:user:pass" into the Host field to auto-fill.
proxy.noSaved: No saved proxies yet — add them on the Proxy Pool page.
proxy.quicWarning: ⚠️ Warning: Only enable this on premium, high-quality proxies that fully support UDP tracking isolation. Enabling QUIC unlocks HTTP/3 speeds but can cause network leaks on poor setups. Default is Disabled (Maximum Stealth).

platform.startupPlaceholder:
https://facebook.com
https://google.com
(Enter one URL per line)
platform.startupHint: URLs to open automatically when the profile launches.
platform.twoFactorHint: Paste the 2FA secret seed for this account. Softglaze generates live 6-digit codes — copy them with one click from the Profiles list (🔑 2FA badge).

fp.webrtcDesc: Controls WebRTC behavior to prevent real IP leaks while keeping compatibility.
fp.timezoneDesc: Browser timezone matches proxy location or your system.
fp.locationDesc: Geolocation API permission behavior and coordinates.
fp.languageDesc: Navigator language code for website requests.
fp.displayLanguageDesc: Browser internal UI language. Websites can sometimes read this.
fp.screenResolutionDesc: Dimensions reported to websites. Keep consistent with your device/OS.
fp.hardwareNoiseSub: Canvas, WebGL, audio noise & GPU metadata
fp.webglMetadataDesc: Real (recommended) reports your true GPU consistently across the page, workers AND service worker — no mismatch. Custom spoofs the GPU string but a service worker still shows the real one, which detectors flag.
fp.webgpuDesc: Modern replacement for WebGL in newer browsers.
fp.hardwareConfigSub: CPU, RAM, device name & MAC address
fp.macAddressDesc: Helps isolate profiles inside local network bounds.

advanced.extensionDesc: The enabled extensions from [Extensions - Team's Extensions] will be installed in the profile.
advanced.dataSyncDesc: Select the data you need to sync across devices.
advanced.browserSettingsDesc: General browser behaviors and startup limits.
advanced.matchTimezone: Real-time match timezone and location to dynamic IP
advanced.allowChromeSignIn: Allow Chrome sign-in (Disabling logs you out of Google)
advanced.disableDevTools: Disable access to Browser Developer Tools
advanced.disableExtInstall: Disable installation and removal of extensions
advanced.enableVirtualCamera: Enable virtual camera to simulate live feed
advanced.startupLastPage: Continue browsing the last opened page
advanced.onlyOpenWithProxy: Only open the browser with an available proxy
advanced.onlyOpenExtLoaded: Only open browser when extension data is successfully loaded
advanced.disableImagesUnit: KB (0 KB means no images loaded)
advanced.randomFingerprintDesc: New fingerprint will be randomly generated on each startup, ignoring some existing settings.

bulk.synchronizeTitle: Launch as Master + Slave mirrored windows (Premium)
bulk.reassignProxyTitle: Reassign, swap, or clear proxies on the selected profiles

filters.savePresetTitle: Save the current filters as a preset
filters.savePresetPrompt: Save the current filters as a preset — name:

table.name: Name
table.emptyDesc: Create your first isolated browser profile to get started.

actions.inUseTitle: In use by {{member}} — ask them to close it first

errors.noCookies: No saved cookies found for this profile yet.
errors.syncMin: Select at least two profiles to synchronize.
errors.proxyHostPort: Please enter at least Host and Port to check.
